title: centaurea gnaphalioides
intro: Centaurea gnaphalioides, also known as Centaurea scabiosa or Centaurea gnaphalodes, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea gnaphalioides is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
